title: three.ws Card v1
description: Strict superset of the ERC-8004 registration card (https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004#registration-v1) for agents whose primary embodiment is a 3D model. Pointed to by the ERC-721 tokenURI on the Identity Registry.

type.description: Conformance URI. MUST include the ERC-8004 registration-v1 URI; SHOULD include the three.ws Card v1 URI.

image.description: Poster / preview image. SHOULD be ipfs:// for immutability.

services.description: ERC-8004 service endpoints (web, A2A, MCP, etc).

registrations.description: On-chain registrations as CAIP-10 references. EVM (ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry): eip155:<chainId>:0x<registry>. Solana (Metaplex Core agent collection): solana:<genesisHash>:<collectionAddress>, with agentId set to the asset address.

onchain.description: Canonical deployment descriptor for the agent's primary on-chain identity. Consumed by the three.ws on-chain badge (src/shared/onchain-badge.js). For Solana, contract_or_mint is the Metaplex Core asset address.

chain.description: CAIP-2 chain id, e.g. solana:5eykt4UsFv8P8NJdTREpY1vzqKqZKvdp or eip155:8453.

model.description: 3D embodiment. Required for three.ws Card v1.

uri.description: Pointer to the GLB/glTF/VRM file. SHOULD be ipfs:// for immutability.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the model bytes. Lets consumers verify the file independently of the URI.

boundingBox.description: Axis-aligned bounding box in meters, model space.

license.description: SPDX license identifier or URL to a license document.

manifest.description: Optional pointer to the full off-chain agent manifest (see specs/AGENT_MANIFEST.md). Use when the agent has a brain/voice/skills bundle.

validation.description: Optional pointer to a signed validation report (see public/validation/REPORT_FORMAT.md).

previousVersion.description: URI of the prior agent card (provenance chain). SHOULD be ipfs:// content hash.
